item.name: Mantle Moray
item.description:
A moray that resembles an ethereal raiment worn by the Ruby Princess...if ethereal raiments looked as though they were about to utter the punchline to a groan-worthy joke.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Resembling the divine raiments worn by the Ruby Princess, this translucent blue moray sways elegantly in the currents. The more transparent the eel's scales, the higher the price it will fetch at market, and merchants make a pretty gil selling the seemingly ephemeral wavekin to collectors eager to boast of their precious find.
